<!-- vignettes/articles/llm-assisted-tips/_setup.qmd
     Shared setup partial for the llm-assisted-tips page set. Included as the
     FIRST body line of every page in this folder (see index.qmd and
     siblings). Re-runs the shared hover-popup infrastructure on every page,
     since each page is now an independent render target
     (JohnGavin/llm#778 Phase 1). This vignette is static prose with no
     targets-pipeline data, so unlike the config/knowledge-evolution sets
     there is no data-loading chunk to carry over.
-->

{{< include /_includes/hover-popups.qmd >}}
